title: Auto-Elytra-Switch
description: This mod switches between your elytra and chestplate for you.
body:
# Auto Elytra

Automatically swaps your elytra into your chest armor slot when you jump off a ledge and activates flight — then swaps your chestplate back when you land. No manual inventory management required.

---

## ✨ Features

* **Seamless swap**
  When you press jump while airborne, the mod finds an elytra in your inventory and equips it, replacing your chestplate. When you land, your chestplate is automatically restored.

* **Multiplayer safe**
  Swaps are performed through proper inventory click packets, so it works correctly on servers.

* **Fully configurable**
  Toggle the mod on/off at any time via the in-game config screen (requires ModMenu + Cloth Config).

* **Client-side only**
  No server-side installation needed.

---

## ⚙️ How It Works

Hold an elytra anywhere in your inventory and wear your chestplate as normal.

When you leap off a cliff and press jump mid-air, Auto Elytra equips the elytra automatically so you can glide. The moment you touch down, your chestplate is put back — ready for combat.

---

## 📦 Requirements

* Fabric Loader
* Fabric API

---

## ➕ Optional

* ModMenu + Cloth Config — for the in-game settings screen

---

(Yes, this is AI and yes I am too lazy to write this text)
